title: French Beef Casserole
description: A hearty French-inspired casserole made with tender beef and a rich, flavorful sauce.
instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Sear the beef in a hot skillet with melted butter until browned, then set aside.
Add the onion and mushroom to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the flour to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the red wine and beef broth, whisking constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened.
Return the beef to the skillet and simmer until heated through.
Transfer the beef and sauce to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the beef is cooked to desired doneness.
